seoTitle: How to Build a Checkout Page in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to create a checkout page in GoHighLevel, connect a product and payment method, and get it ready to accept real orders.
intro: A checkout page is what turns a GoHighLevel funnel into something that can actually collect payment. This guide covers building a checkout page, connecting it to a product, and setting up payment processing so it's ready to take orders.

steps.heading: Create a checkout page inside a funnel
steps.body: Add a checkout page as a step within your funnel builder in GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Connect a product
steps.body: Link the checkout page to the product or service you want customers to purchase, including its price and any variations.

steps.heading: Set up your payment processor
steps.body: Connect a supported payment gateway so the checkout page can actually process transactions.

steps.heading: Customize the page layout
steps.body: Adjust the design and fields on the checkout page so it matches your branding and collects the customer information you need.

steps.heading: Test the checkout flow
steps.body: Run a test transaction to confirm the page collects payment correctly and the order data lands where you expect it.

faq.question: Do I need a separate payment processor account?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to connect a supported payment gateway to your GoHighLevel account before your checkout page can process real transactions.

faq.question: Can I sell more than one product on the same checkout page?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel supports adding order bumps or multiple products to a single checkout flow.

faq.question: Can I add upsells after checkout?
faq.answer: Yes, you can chain upsell or downsell pages after the initial checkout step within the same funnel.

faq.question: Why isn't my checkout page processing test transactions?
faq.answer: Check that your payment processor is properly connected and that the product pricing is correctly configured before troubleshooting further.
